'''Tiranga''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who owned and operated [[Tiranga's Loft]]. A spinal cord injury as a young worm left him partially paralysed from the waist to the end of his tail. The injury stunted his growth at only two-point-five [[Meter/Legends|Imperial standard meters]].

{{Char-stub}}
